videos.headline: Jeremiyah Love breaks free for a 48-yard Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Jeremiyah Love turns on the jets and outruns Purdue's defense for a 48-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremiyah Love breaks free for a 48-yard Notre Dame TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Boubacar Traore take an INT to the house for Notre Dame
videos.description: Boubacar Traore snags the interception and takes it 34 yards to the house for a Notre Dame touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Boubacar Traore take an INT to the house for Notre Dame ) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard stiff-arms his way to an impressive Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Riley Leonard breaks free for an impressive 34-yard rushing touchdown to pad Notre Dame's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard stiff-arms his way to an impressive Notre Dame TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
